Package org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator

Class IdentifierDecomposer

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator.IdentifierDecomposer
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISequentTransformer
public class IdentifierDecomposer extends Object implements ISequentTransformer
New implementation of identifier decomposition implemented as a sequent transformer.

The substitution for free identifiers of Cartesian product type (i.e., identifiers that hide a maplet) is pre-computed in the constructor. The bound identifier decomposition is performed on the fly for each predicate.

    • transform

      public Predicate transform(ITrackedPredicate tpred)
      Description copied from interface: ISequentTransformer
      Transforms a predicate into another predicate. In some context, it might be assumed that the original and transformed predicates are equivalent or equisatisfiable. However, such assumption is not part of the contract of this method and must be enforced at a higher level.

      A null value can be returned to indicate that this transformer cannot handle the given predicate.

      Specified by:
      transform in interface ISequentTransformer
      Parameters:
      tpred - tracked predicate to transform
      Returns:
      a transformed predicate or null
